title: Workflow Health — Layer 7
description: Real-time health of every workflow: run count, success rate, per-step latency, recent failures.
notes: Every workflow carries a trace_id. No PII; tenant_id and customer_handle only.

panels.title: Workflow run count
panels.query: count of traces grouped by workflow from agent_observability /recent over 1h

panels.title: Workflow success rate
panels.query: share of traces with success=true grouped by workflow over 1h

panels.title: Latency per workflow step
panels.query: avg(latency_ms) of nested spans grouped by span name within workflow trace over 1h

panels.title: Recent failed workflows
panels.query: traces where success=false ordered by created_at desc limit 50, fields workflow, trace_id, error_type

panels.title: Workflows missing a trace_id
panels.query: count of workflow runs where trace_id is empty over 24h
